{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211446349FE88B04305F3AA32DB3"}"},"total":8113},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7251577005593985850","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"琴叔加油啊！是你的老粉了，从拒入黑道、年少轻狂、无法无天、谁与争锋、少年王、龙抬头所有社会类的书基本都看了，最最喜欢的就是谁与争锋5人组，左飞猴子黄杰郑午马杰，尤其是飞猴杰，三足鼎立那里，封神！还有各种经典梗，人物刻画描写的太好了，文笔也非常风趣幽默，但是目前虎出山还是距离谁与争锋有一定的距离。希望琴叔继续加油，重回巅峰！","text_exts":[{"e":23,"s":19,"text":"年少轻狂","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B9%B4%E5%B0%91%E8%BD%BB%E7%8B%82&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740755943AA32DB3%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227251577005593985850%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227166531938944027683%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B9%B4%E5%B0%91%E8%BD%BB%E7%8B%82%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":33,"s":29,"text":"谁与争锋","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B0%81%E4%B8%8E%E4%BA%89%E9%94%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740755943AA32DB3%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227251577005593985850%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227166531938944027683%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B0%81%E4%B8%8E%E4%BA%89%E9%94%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":37,"s":34,"text":"少年王","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B0%91%E5%B9%B4%E7%8E%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740755943AA32DB3%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%22725157 },"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7327719109683872549","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到结尾了，剧情还不错，很紧凑，连接都很到位，只是后期有点偏武侠修仙类了。梁家军的梁小孟在前中期给我的印象挺深，每当她出现的时候都能把主角的情感体现出来，后期就有点打酱油了感觉。还有天子刀和天子匕，刚出现的时候我以为李天子会用得到，结果我猜错了，人家直接拿给梁军哲和李虎用。总体还是挺不错的，刚开始在某音刷视频看到，只有前面一下段，后来才在这里找到，看了很久  还是蛮不错的！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706119644,"group_id":"7166531938944027683","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwaJszVll5JcNar/8bY6UTwla1JYve7ZwZuyz/HkuhN3","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3466126877004776","user_name":"火锅煮辣条"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3466126877004776","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7166531938944027683","book_info":{"abstract":"（原书名：虎出山）
《虎出山》同名短剧已在红果app上映
因误杀老流氓，李虎入狱三年。出狱后，江湖大哥洪卫军找到他，出手就送了一座酒吧……与此同时，警察也找到他，希望他能帮忙将洪卫军送进监狱……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/70b6050ab3814fd8560863a2874c949c","author":"抚琴的人","author_id":"","book_id":"7166531938944027683","book_name":"出狱后的江湖风云","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":826,"name":"黑道","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=826&name=黑道&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1460,"name":"都市江湖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1460&name=都市江湖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7166537847384572454","read_count":"69061","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3232067"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"1370","tags":"都市日常,都市,黑道,都市江湖","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/892179b60f0a0d7dc9731a49184dae20~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779259594&x-signature=RzDje3qpZbMGjaaVek9hO948jPw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"228295054470871","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"630"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211446349FE88B04305F3AA32DB3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读40小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":72865,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":144624,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":21572},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7180313642276340519","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"最近不知道第n遍刷轻狂，只能说经典就是百看不厌。看到血洗北七那体内的热血又沸腾了。不得不说抚琴不良系列的书里面的人物就是有血有肉。随便一个配角都有他的亮点之处。
年少轻狂，纯黑无武侠。王浩有情有义，身边兄弟不断。一路既有大哥宇城飞呵护，又有叶展和砖头两个好兄弟陪伴。 四个女主角夏雪 桃子 周墨 白青 各有各的特色。
拒入黑道 文笔青涩，一路见证了周明的成长。赵午圣夜走风雪夜堪称全书最绝。周明在成长中逐渐成为了合格的恶狼帮领袖。最终被迫加入黑蝴蝶，隐姓埋名。女友楚婷婷，心中的白月光，太完美了。
谁与争锋，抚琴的又一巅峰之作。最大的看点就是 左飞 猴子 黄杰 郑午 马杰之间的情义，他们不离不弃，让人看了感动。还有开创的的幽默风格，里面的搞笑的段子所有书中一绝。兼备热血 搞笑 兄弟剧情。
少年王 龙抬头 天下第一 公子无双 都市斩妖人也各有各的亮点。其中有许多令人印象深刻的剧情和人物塑造。里面矛盾的人性也让我感受着书中人物的复杂性。
新书看到现在，有热血的兄弟，眼前棘手的敌人，还有未擦出火花的感情线。回来了又好似一直都在，那个我们熟悉的作者，那个拍案叫绝的人物剧情。新书加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671797152,"group_id":"7166531938944027683","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2683277339274483"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7166531938944027683","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.0132145e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读19小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":70131,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":90},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7167181625808634656","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"再续不良系列巅峰。再续拒黑
